detail: Threshold quantile 0.975 was selected on validation and the final threshold value 345.0000 was computed from y_train_all only.
The luxury router classifier was fit on training rows only, then applied to validation/test rows.
The chosen blend strategy bucket_specific_weight and its weights were tuned using validation predictions only.
The test set was held out until the final baseline/segmented/blended comparison.
The current HGB log-price baseline is stored inside the blended bundle and remains the fallback model.
